name: notes_daily_read
description: Read a daily note by date. Defaults to today if no date is provided.

date.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g. '2026-04-06'). Omit for today's note.

scope.description: Path to the directory relative to the sandbox root (e.g. 'my-notes'). Omit when the notes is at the sandbox root.

name: notes_daily_write
description: Create or overwrite a daily note by date. Defaults to today if no date is provided.

date.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g. '2026-04-06'). Omit for today's note.

scope.description: Path to the directory relative to the sandbox root (e.g. 'my-notes'). Omit when the notes is at the sandbox root.

content.description: Full note content in markdown format including YAML frontmatter

name: notes_daily_append
description: Append content to a daily note by date. Creates the file if it does not exist. Defaults to today if no date is provided.

date.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g. '2026-04-06'). Omit for today's note.

scope.description: Path to the directory relative to the sandbox root (e.g. 'my-notes'). Omit when the notes is at the sandbox root.

content.description: Content to append to the daily note
